Virelia Therapeutics, Inc. (a Delaware corporation) — Internal Compliance Memorandum dated 05/28/2026 re Regulation FD, GLBA, HIPAA alignment.
To: Board Audit & Compliance Committee; From: Ms. Alina Cortez, Chief Compliance Officer; cc: analyst relations (role only), treasury.
Entity identifiers: Delaware Div. of Corporations File No. 6587421; E I N: 1 2 - 3 4 5 6 7 8 9; principal office 41 Spruce Loop, Fairvale, UT 84000.
Contact for follow-up: alina.cortez@virelia-thera.com; direct 415-555-0191; public helpline 800-555-1212 (general inquiries only).
Banking workflow: Harbor & Glen Community Bank KYC received using acct 0 0 6 7 - 2 2 9 9 3 1 and ABA 123456789 (invalid per our checksum check); do not retransmit until confirmation.
Employee identification used for KYC: Ms. Jenna Vale (VP, Clinical Ops), U.S. passport P<USAVALE<<JENNA<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< 710238945; copy stored in secure vault.
Preliminary Q2 admissions and payer mix indicate net patient service revenue trending ~7–9% above internal guidance; this is MNPI under Rule 10b-5/Reg FD and not to be shared with sell-side analysts.
We plan a simultaneous press release and Form 8-K filing before the Midtown Exchange investor day; any selective briefings (e.g., Mr. Dorian Pike at Lumidrift Research) are prohibited.
Patient workflow note: quality dashboard uses household-level counts; no PHI is included, and there has not been a material adverse change to clinical safety metrics.
For avoidance of doubt, this memo does not include PHI or SSNs; generic form fields in appendices (e.g., “SSN: ______”, “Address: on file”) are placeholders only.
Internal URLs with embedded identifiers must not be forwarded: https://intra.virelia-thera.com/ir?eid=12-3 4 5 6 7 8 9&deal=VIR-2026-Q2 and https://ops.virelia-thera.com/patient?mrn=A 0 1 9 4 3 2.
External references allowed: product names MediFlux 2.0 and CareLane are public; metrics derived solely from public CMS county datasets and our last earnings deck are OK to cite.
Next steps: finalize draft 8-k, schedule 1:1s post-release only, scrub slides for direct identifiers, and log all analyst questions in the IR tracker.
